categories.name: THE BRITS ADD U TO IT

questions.clue: The Brits have a sense of this amusing word & insert "u" to make it 6 letters

To perceive by taste or smell, with relish

final.clue: Team nicknames of the 8 Ivy League schools include 4 animals, 3 colors & this Christian denomination
final.answer: the Quakers (of the University of Pennsylvania)
